title: Master Buffer.allocUnsafe vs. Buffer.alloc
description: Distinguish between `Buffer.allocUnsafe` and `Buffer.alloc` in terms of memory allocation and security. Explain the concept of memory pooling and pre-allocation with Node.js Buffers. Identify and mitigate security risks associated with uninitialized memory from `Buffer.allocUnsafe`.
objectives: Distinguish between `Buffer.allocUnsafe` and `Buffer.alloc` in terms of memory allocation and security.
Explain the concept of memory pooling and pre-allocation with Node.js Buffers.
Identify and mitigate security risks associated with uninitialized memory from `Buffer.allocUnsafe`.
